examples: The witness stands unsworn unsworn testimony.
Sworn or unsworn evidence either orally or in writing given by a person.
An appellant is usually given a choice at the hearing of either making an unsworn statement or alternatively giving evidence on oath in support of this appeal.
Mr Armstrong described Mr Howell's silence as deafening, and said an unsworn statement by Kaniel Martin was lies.
Waxman said Chung had given similar off-the-record, unsworn briefings to the Senate Governmental Affairs Committee and to investigators from the Department of Justice.
